questionHtml:
Which process is common to photosynthesis and cell respiration?

A. Photolysis

B. The Calvin cycle

C. The Krebs cycle

D. Chemiosmosis

meta.title: Which process is common to photosynthesis and cell respiration? A. Photolysis B. The Calvin cycle C. The Krebs cycle D. Chemiosmosis
breadcrumbLabels: C1.2.15. Chemiosmosis and the synthesis of ATP in the mitochondrion
